summary: Functional but significant issues. CRITICAL: workflow YAML lines 20-105 (TC1-TC5 test cases) are ~85% duplicated—each test follows identical structure (dot-source, define arrays, call function, validate). This violates DRY and makes future test additions/modifications fragile. Should factor into a parameterized helper function. Actions security: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA (should reference full 40-char commit with version date comment). PowerShell: missing Set-StrictMode at script entry (best practice). Script logic is clean; error handling is good. Not production-ready without deduplication.
